title: Editing - Cut, Paste, Backspace, Select All
description: PopClip's bread-and-butter buttons. Cut/Paste/Delete operate on the selection; Select All expands it. Sends Ctrl+X / Ctrl+V / Backspace / Ctrl+A via xdotool.

title: Formatting - Bold, Italic, Underline
description: Rich-text formatting via Ctrl+B / Ctrl+I / Ctrl+U. Works in Google Docs, Word, LibreOffice, Notion, Obsidian and most webmail composers.

title: Large type
description: Show the selection in giant fullscreen text. Useful for reading a number aloud, showing a code across the room, or enlarging tiny menu items.

title: Clipboard history & snippets
description: Recent clipboard entries (text + images) plus saved snippets with triggers, placeholders, and variables. The picker is the home of both.

title: Word and character count
description: Shows word, character and line counts as a desktop notification

title: Calculator
description: Evaluates math expressions in the selection (sqrt, sin, pi, ...)

title: Case converter
description: UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case and slugify

title: Speak aloud
description: Reads the selection out loud via spd-say or espeak

title: Text transformations bundle
description: Reverse, sort lines, deduplicate, trim, strip HTML, remove diacritics, ASCII-only, swap case - 8 buttons in one plugin

title: QR code
description: Generates a QR code from text or a URL (requires qrencode)

title: Search Google
description: Opens Google with the selection pre-filled - auto-submits

title: Define this word
description: Looks up a dictionary definition via Google's 'define' search - the fastest way to clarify an unfamiliar word

title: Search Wikipedia
description: English Wikipedia full-text search

title: Google Translate to English
description: Auto-detect source language → translate to English

title: Look up in Google Maps
description: Address, place name or coordinates → Maps search

title: Search YouTube
description: Quick YouTube search for the selection

title: Search Stack Overflow
description: Looks up the selection on Stack Overflow

title: Search MDN web docs
description: Mozilla Developer Network - HTML/CSS/JS reference

title: Search GitHub
description: Code search across GitHub

title: PyPI package lookup
description: Opens https://pypi.org/project/<your-selection>/

title: npm package lookup
description: Opens https://www.npmjs.com/package/<your-selection>

title: Send to chat AI
description: Copies text and opens Claude/ChatGPT/Gemini/Perplexity/Google AI - no setup, no API keys

title: Local AI (Ollama)
description: Explain, summarize, translate, rewrite - runs locally via Ollama (free, offline). Requires Ollama with a model installed.

title: Base64 encode/decode
description: Encodes or decodes selected text as Base64 and copies the result

title: JSON pretty-print
description: Pretty-prints JSON and copies it to the clipboard

title: URL encode/decode
description: Percent-encodes or decodes text for use in URLs

title: Hashes and JWT decode
description: SHA-256, MD5 and JWT payload decode - output to clipboard with a notification

title: Timestamp and color converters
description: Auto-detects Unix epoch ↔ ISO 8601, #hex ↔ rgb(r,g,b)

title: HTML entity encode/decode
description:
café & "co"

↔ <p>café & "co"</p>
